---
title: "Job Market Analysis 2024"
subtitle: "A Data-Driven Look at Salaries, Regions, and Career Trends"
author: "Afreen Alam, Lo Ying Wu, Nutchanon Chaiyaratana, Tsyr Rau Chen "
date: "06/04/2026"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

## About This Project

This is a structured research report analyzing job market trends based on real data from the **Lightcast job postings dataset**. Using Python and Quarto, we explore how salaries, regions, and job types differ across AI and non-AI careers in 2024.

Our analysis includes charts, tables, and data-driven insights — covering everything from wage gaps to remote work trends.

---

## Research Questions

We structured our analysis around four core questions:

1. **How do salaries differ across AI vs. non-AI careers?**
2. **What regions offer the highest-paying jobs in AI-related and traditional careers?**
3. **Are remote jobs better paying than in-office roles?**
4. **What industries saw the biggest wage growth in 2024?**

---

## Meet the Team

| Name | Background |
|------|------------|
| Afreen Alam | MS Applied Business Analytics, Boston University |
| Nutchanon Chaiyaratana | MS Applied Business Analytics, Boston University |
| Lo Ying Wu | MS Applied Business Analytics, Boston University |
| Tsyr Rau Chen | MS Applied Business Analytics, Boston University |
